name: storage-room-flash
prompt: Close-up memory flash panel. Male hands with warm skin cupping a pale-skinned girl's face. A crystalline earring fracturing, frost crystals shattering outward. Bright warm flash lighting. Blurred dreamlike edges. Amber and ice-blue color clash. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

name: opening-drawer
prompt: Medium shot from side angle. Young woman with deep red wavy disheveled hair standing at wooden vanity table, hand pulling open a drawer beneath the fogged mirror. Warm amber lighting. Heat shimmer visible in air. Academy dormitory bedroom at night. Tense deliberate posture. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

sfx.description: wooden drawer sliding open slowly, intimate quiet room

name: altar-contents
prompt: Close-up overhead shot looking down into an open wooden vanity drawer. Items arranged on dark velvet lining: a pale blue silk scarf with frost crystal traces woven into fabric, a pen with a bitten cap, and a glossy photograph of a silver-haired girl at a podium. Warm amber light illuminating contents from above. Intimate detail shot. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
